name: paid-measurement-loop
description: Use when the user asks to "read back" a paid campaign change, "did this ad change work", or "compare ROAS/CPA before and after"; reads ROAS/CPA against a control over a fixed readback window and returns a Promote / Keep-testing / Rollback / Unproven readback decision with the math delegated to roi-calculator. Not for RQS scoring or veto adjudication — use ad-account-auditor; not for the ROI ratio math — use roi-calculator; not for cross-channel rollups — use performance-analyzer. 付费广告复盘/ROAS回看/投
author: aaron-he-zhu
